name: OneDrive - Data Exfiltration or Data Destruction
conditions_text: when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Office 365
when the event matches Affected Workload (custom) is any of OneDrive
when the event matches Operation (custom) is any of [FileDeleted or FileModified]
TD_list: APPLY OneDrive - Data Exfiltration or Data Destruction on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Office 365
AND when the event matches Affected Workload (custom) is any of OneDrive
AND when the event matches Operation (custom) is any of [FileDeleted or FileModified]
RED_list: Event name: OneDrive - Data Exfiltration or Data Destruction
Event description: Flags mass deletion or modification of files in OneDrive, an indicator of data theft or ransomware.
Force the dispatched event to create a NEW offense, select the offense using Username
Include detected events by "Username" from this point forward, in the offense, for 300 second(s)
This information should contribute to the name of the associated offense(s)
